_meta.note: Colors are the real route_color hex values from the official GTFS feeds, so they match Google Maps. Waypoints are ordered stops/streets for drawing an approximate line, not the exact GTFS shape geometry.
_meta.geometry_source: GTFS shapes.txt (representative longest shape per route); follows real streets
